aiStudio.title: Wise AI Workspace
aiStudio.primaryWorkflowsDesc: Start with the main outcomes most people need from Wise AI.
aiStudio.primaryWorkflowsSide: Built to feel like one workspace, not a long list of isolated tools.
aiStudio.secondaryToolsDesc: Supporting workflows that stay available without crowding the main grid.
aiStudio.placeholder0: Ask Wise AI to improve your resume for a specific role...
aiStudio.placeholder1: Try: "Tailor my resume for a growth marketing job"
aiStudio.placeholder2: Try: "Give me interview stories for this company"
aiStudio.tip0: Start with the job-tailoring workflow when you already have a role in mind. It keeps your resume, fit, and follow-up steps together.
aiStudio.tip1: Use the resume-improvement workflow first when you want stronger wording before you tailor anything.
aiStudio.tip2: Research the company before interview practice so your answers sound more specific and informed.

linkedin-brand.title: LinkedIn & Brand
linkedin-brand.description: Optimize your profile headline, about section, and experience bullets for search visibility.

cover-letter.title: Cover Letter Writer
cover-letter.description: Generate dynamic, ATS-friendly cover letters tailored to your target job descriptions.

dashboardStats.motivational2: One great resume away from your dream job
dashboardStats.motivational3: Today is the perfect day to stand out
dashboardStats.tip0: Tailoring your resume to each job description tends to increase callbacks.
dashboardStats.tip1: Use numbers and metrics — recruiters skim quickly, so quantified results stand out.
dashboardStats.tip2: A strong summary section helps recruiters grasp your value at a glance.
dashboardStats.tip3: Keep your resume to one page if you have under 10 years of experience.
dashboardStats.tip4: Use action verbs like "led", "built", and "improved" to stand out.
dashboardStats.tip5: Adding relevant keywords from the job posting helps you pass ATS filters.
dashboardStats.tip6: Proofread your resume twice — typos are one of the fastest ways to get screened out.
dashboardStats.tip7: Quantify achievements: "Increased revenue by 25%" reads stronger than vague claims.
dashboardStats.tip8: Update your resume every few months, even if you're not job hunting.
